title: Here's A Bottle And An Honest Friend!
content:
Here's a bottle and an honest friend!
            What wad you wish for mair, man?
        Wha kens before his life may end,
            What his share may be o' care, man?
        Then catch the moments as they fly,
            And use them as ye ought, man?
        Believe me, happiness is shy,
            And comes not ay when sought, man.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "Here's A Bottle And An Honest Friend!", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
